channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: AFP Defends Teodoro and Rejects China's Sanctions as Political Intimidation
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) expressed strong support for Defense Secretary Gilbert 'Gibo' Teodoro Jr. after China imposed sanctions on him and members of his family. China announced that...

item.title: Analyst Criticizes Reported Iran Agreement Terms and Says Trump May Seek a Quick Exit from Negotiations
item.description: A discussion on MSNBC's Morning Joe focused on reported details of a potential agreement between the Trump administration and Iran after President Donald Trump reportedly halted a planned military str...

item.title: PM Shehbaz links national security with economic stability during federal budget approval meeting
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, while addressing a federal cabinet meeting ahead of the presentation of Pakistan’s third budget, emphasised that no country can effectively manage its affairs or achieve...

item.title: Ruto Says International Trips Support Kenya's Economic, Technology and Blue Economy Goals
item.description: President William Ruto has defended the frequency of his recent foreign travels, saying that international engagement is a key part of his responsibilities as Kenya's president and chief diplomat. Spe...

item.title: Republican Lawmakers Express Concerns Over Trump's Iran Strategy and Potential Political Costs
item.description: A growing number of Republican lawmakers publicly distanced themselves from President Donald Trump's increasingly aggressive approach toward Iran after he reportedly threatened to seize Kharg Island, ...

item.title: Don Honeyman: Master Fashion Photographer of Mid-20th Century Vogue
item.description: Don Honeyman (1919–2011) was an American-born British photographer celebrated for his elegant fashion and portrait work during the mid-20th century. He started his career in 1940 at American Vogue, as...

item.title: Top Face Sunscreen Recommendations for 2026, Including Options for Sensitive, Acne-Prone and Dry Skin
item.description: Global News' The Curator published a guide highlighting 10 face sunscreens recommended for different skin types and skincare needs in 2026. The article emphasizes that daily sunscreen use remains one ...

item.title: Africa Clean Cooking Summit in Nairobi Rescheduled as Organisers Cite International Travel Challenges
item.description: The 2026 Summit on Clean Cooking in Africa, which had been planned for 9–10 July in Nairobi, has been postponed following concerns over international travel and participation. According to a joint sta...

item.title: Report Says Senior HHS Adviser Chris Klomp Has Gained Significant Influence Within Kennedy's Department
item.description: A report published by Politico and discussed by Raw Story examines the growing influence of Chris Klomp within the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) under Secretary Robert F. Kennedy ...

item.title: Supreme Court rejects immediate intervention in Congress leader’s Rajya Sabha nomination dispute, directs election petition route
item.description: The Supreme Court of India on Friday refused to entertain a writ petition filed by Congress leader Meenakshi Natarajan challenging the rejection of her nomination for the Rajya Sabha elections in Madh...

item.title: Opinion Column Criticizes Moms.gov as a Government-Backed Anti-Abortion Resource
item.description: In this opinion article, columnist Tara Dublin argues that Republican efforts to restrict abortion rights have increasingly blended government policy with religiously motivated advocacy. The author cr...

item.title: Youth Disillusionment in Tarime: Barriers in Agriculture, Education, and Governance Drive Apathy
item.description: In Tarime, a fertile agricultural area in Mara Region, Tanzania, young people are increasingly losing confidence in both agriculture and political participation. A recent youth dialogue held in Saba S...

item.title: Maharashtra Police register case against comedian Pranit More and audience members over controversial remarks shared online
item.description: The Maharashtra Police have registered a case against comedian Pranit More and several others over allegedly objectionable content circulated through online videos from a comedy show. The case was fil...

item.title: Massive Fire Destroys Medline Distribution Warehouse in Tracy, California
item.description: A major fire broke out shortly before 1 p.m. on June 11, 2026, at the Medline Distribution Center in Tracy, California, a medical supplies warehouse covering approximately one million square feet. The...

item.title: Taylor Swift appears courtside at Knicks vs. Spurs NBA Finals Game 4 at Madison Square Garden
item.description: Taylor Swift was among the high-profile celebrities in attendance at Game 4 of the 2026 NBA Finals between the New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs at Madison Square Garden. The Associated Press repo...

item.title: Garuda Indonesia and SAS Introduce Codeshare Flights Connecting Indonesia and Scandinavian Cities
item.description: Garuda Indonesia and Scandinavian Airlines (SAS) have announced a new codeshare agreement designed to improve air connectivity between Indonesia and the Nordic region. The partnership, signed on June ...

item.title: International students join interactive team-based Russian language learning session in Moscow
item.description: International students from BRICS countries participated in an interactive open lesson held at the BRICS+ Information and Cultural Media Centre in Moscow, where they tested their Russian language skil...

item.title: Trump Replaces Acting DNI Bill Pulte and Nominates Jay Clayton for Permanent Intelligence Chief Role

item.title: Windsor Residents Seek Clear Answers Following Delay to Gordie Howe International Bridge Opening
item.description: Residents of Windsor are voicing disappointment and concern after the planned opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge was delayed. The bridge, a major infrastructure project intended to streng...

item.title: Tanzania and Singapore Deepen Economic Cooperation Through Tax, Trade and Investment Agreements
item.description: Tanzania and Singapore have strengthened their bilateral relations following the signing of five agreements and memoranda of understanding during the state visit of Singapore President Tharman Shanmug...
